_comment: Manual overlay for PCP & Specialist office-visit cost-sharing. Each entry is keyed by 'YEAR-CONTRACTID-PLANID-SEGMENTID' and matches a plan exactly. Copy values from the carrier's plan-detail page (e.g. uhc.com, aetnamedicare.com, humana.com) or from medicare.gov's Plan Finder. Run `node scripts/seedPbpOverlay.mjs` after editing.

_fields.pcpCopay: Dollar copay for in-network primary-care visit. Use 0 for $0. Set to null if the plan uses coinsurance.
_fields.pcpCoinsurance: Percent (0-100) for in-network primary-care visit. Set to null if the plan uses a flat copay.
_fields.specialistCopay: Dollar copay for in-network specialist visit. Use 0 for $0. Set to null if the plan uses coinsurance.
_fields.specialistCoinsurance: Percent (0-100) for in-network specialist visit. Set to null if the plan uses a flat copay.
_fields.source: Free-text URL or note for traceability. Not stored in MongoDB.
